name: Renju
author: AGP
description: Renju — professional Gomoku on a 15x15 board with Black-handicap (forbidden-move) rules. Black moves first and must make EXACTLY five in a row to win; a Black overline (six or more) does not win, and Black is forbidden from making a double-three, double-four, or overline (Black loses immediately, unless the same move also makes an exact five). White wins with five OR MORE in a row and has no restrictions. Base forbidden-move ruleset only (no opening rules).
